APPEARANCES:
Mia Mattis, Esq., of HAROWITZ & TIGERMAN, LLP (415-788-1588) for plaintiffs / moving parties Byron David, et al.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS BYRON DAVID, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN, IRENE ARNOLD, LAUREN DAVID'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE SURVIVAL AND WRONGFUL DEATH ACTIONS

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to consolidate survival and wrongful death actions is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 275510 and 275812 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 275510. One order for both cases was signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Survival And Wrongful Death Actions
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to consolidate survival and wrongful death actions is denied without prejudice. Plaintiffs failed to provide proper notice by failing to add an additional two court days for electronic service as required by C.C.P. 1010.6. Plaintiffs may re-file the motion providing sufficient notice under C.C.P. 1005(b) & 1010.6. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)
